credentialRequirements.name: CONTAINER_REGISTRY_TOKEN
credentialRequirements.obtainedFrom: Container registry provider (Docker Hub, GHCR, ECR)

credentialRequirements.name: RUNTIME_CLUSTER_KUBECONFIG
credentialRequirements.description: Kubernetes cluster kubeconfig or runtime deploy token
credentialRequirements.obtainedFrom: Cluster provider admin (GKE, EKS, AKS, Fly.io, Render)

approvalGate.blockedReason: Container deployment requires CONTAINER_REGISTRY_TOKEN, DATABASE_URL, and RUNTIME_CLUSTER_KUBECONFIG. No credentials supplied in proof pass.
requiredUserActions: Supply RUNTIME_CLUSTER_KUBECONFIG or equivalent runtime deploy token

secretPolicyChecks.description: No .env files with real credential values committed to source
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No committed .env files with real credential values detected for api_service

secretPolicyChecks.description: Environment variable manifest (.env.example or app.config.json) is present
All required credentials declare mustNotBeCommitted=true for secrets
secretPolicyChecks.detail: mustNotBeCommitted=true is declared for all secret-class credentials in the credential manifest.

secretPolicyChecks.description: No hardcoded secret patterns (API keys, JWT tokens, AWS keys) found in source files
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No hardcoded secret patterns detected in api_service source files

caveat: This manifest declares credential requirements for approved credentialed deployment. No credentials are stored, validated, or used in this proof pass. Live deployment is blocked by default and requires explicit user approval and user-supplied credentials.
